name: Curve Master Football
description: Become the ultimate football legend in Curve Master Football! This isnt just about kicking the ball; its about mastering the art of the swerve. Use your finger to draw the perfect curved path, guiding the ball around walls, tricky defenders, and the goalkeeper to score spectacular goals. Experience the satisfaction of a Perfect Shot with slow-motion effects as you hit the top corner. Progress through 300+ increasingly difficult levels, collect coins to unlock 30+ unique ball skins, and claim your Daily Rewards. Aim for the Bullseye targets for extra points and climb the Global Leaderboard. Can you master the arc and become the world champ
instructions: Mobile Touch Touch and drag on the screen to draw a path for the ball Release to shoot Desktop Click and hold the Left Mouse Button to draw the path Release to shoot
